content: We can refactor an ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agent to use triple-signal hybrid retrieval as its intrinsic reward signal generator, where the three signals of the retrieval system correspond to the prediction error, feature novelty, and state reachability that the ICM uses to calculate intrinsic reward. This parallel hybrid retrieval structure eliminates the sequential latency that plagues traditional step-by-step intrinsic reward calculation, letting the agent constantly explore high-novelty state spaces without latency lag.
